name: starry-summer
description: Personal content platform for writing, notes, moments, projects, and reader interaction.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @starry-summer/shared && npm run build --workspace @starry-summer/markdown && npm run build --workspace @starry-summer/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @starry-summer/shared && npm run test --workspace @starry-summer/markdown && npm run test --workspace @starry-summer/web && npm run test:ops
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @starry-summer/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @starry-summer/markdown && npm run typecheck --workspace @starry-summer/web
